reasoning: The history shows that when R1 increased from 10 to 20 (delta +10), total_resistance increased from 15 to 25 (delta +10). When R1 increased from 20 to 30 (delta +10), total_resistance increased from 25 to 35 (delta +10). This linear relationship where the change in total_resistance equals the change in R1, while R2 remains constant, strongly supports the series circuit formula: total_resistance = R1 + R2. I have sufficient evidence to conclude the equation.
